title: Preview Bicep/ARM changes with what-if before deploying
description: Author idempotent Bicep modules and run az deployment what-if so the exact resource delta is reviewed before any apply.
body: Use when authoring infrastructure as Bicep/ARM or before a deployment. Do not deploy a template blindly or hand-edit live resources that a template owns. Actions: structure resources into Bicep modules with parameters, run az deployment group what-if to see Create/Modify/Delete deltas, review especially any Delete or property change on stateful resources, and deploy in incremental mode. Validation signals include what-if showing only the intended changes and no unexpected deletions, and the deployment succeeding idempotently on re-run. Risk boundary: a what-if showing deletion or replacement of a production resource is human-gated.
